---
title: "2014 in Review"
date: 2014-12-30
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
description: "A year-in-review of 2014: finishing a postdoc, publishing a paper, moving from Australia to the San Francisco Bay Area, completing the Insight Data Science fellowship, and starting a job as a data scientist."
categories: [personal, data-science]
---

[![Berlin](http://jonathanwhitmore.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/12/37-2014-06-21-15.53.18-300x225.jpg)](http://jonathanwhitmore.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/12/37-2014-06-21-15.53.18.jpg) Thanks to everyone who helped make this past year great – I’ve been incredibly fortunate to have people who have helped support me in all of my adventures. Below are a few highlights from 2014!
### Some of my major life events:


- Finished my 3 year postdoc under [Michael Murphy](http://astronomy.swin.edu.au/~mmurphy/) at Swinburne University of Technology.

- Published a paper with Michael that was the culmination of years of work. The [pdf is here](http://mnras.oxfordjournals.org/cgi/reprint/stu2420?ijkey=4TQiyQrzoz10dmv&keytype=ref) if curious.

- Moved from Australia to the San Francisco Bay Area.

- Brought Julija home to meet the parents over Thanksgiving.

- Completed the [Insight Data Science](http://insightdatascience.com/) program.

- Started at [SVDS](http://svds.com/) as a [Data Scientist](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_science)!


### Places that I visited (and spent at least two nights this year)


- Dallas, TX, USA (family/friends)

- Washington, D.C., USA (AAS)

- Phoenix, AZ, USA (visit Stephanie/Kelsey)

- San Diego, CA, USA (talk at UCSD)

- Melbourne, AUS (postdoc life, [Marc](http://www.marc.rafelski.com/) visited!)

- Hobart, AUS ([Dave](https://plus.google.com/photos/111973479290948291396/albums/6006994917563005697)!)

- Paris, FRA ([week in Paris](https://plus.google.com/photos/111973479290948291396/albums/6030164680341136209))

- Amsterdam, NLD ([week in Amsterdam](https://plus.google.com/photos/111973479290948291396/albums/6030318089124801153) –Julija!)

- Zurich, CHE (Kern!)

- Glasgow, GBR ([IMAX Glasgow](http://www.glasgowsciencecentre.org/special-events/to-infinity.html))

- Cambridge, GBR (talk at Cambridge)

- Berlin, DEU ([photos](https://plus.google.com/photos/111973479290948291396/albums/6030259666711907313))

- Potsdam, DEU (visit at Potsdam University)

- Sydney, AUS (Harley Wood Winter School)

- Palo Alto, CA, USA ([Insight Data Science](http://insightdatascience.com/))

- Dallas, TX, USA (family/friends)

- Mountain View, CA, USA (started work at [SVDS](http://svds.com/))

- Dallas, TX, USA (family/friends)



Fun final list:

### Seasons experienced this year (in order)


- Winter

- Summer

- Autumn

- Spring

- Summer

- Winter

- Summer

- Autumn

- Winter
